execPay.s: German BaFin — €1B BaFin / Braunschweig prosecutor fine (Jun 2018) for breach of supervisory duty in the diesel emissions scandal.

wiki.extract: Volkswagen Group of America, Inc., is the North American operational headquarters, and subsidiary of the Volkswagen Group of automobile companies of Germany. VWoA is responsible for six marques: Audi, Bentley, Lamborghini, and Volkswagen, and in addition is the exclusive importer and distributor of Bugatti and Rimac cars in the U.S. It also controls VW Credit, Inc., Volkswagen's financial services and credit operations. The company is headquartered in Reston, Virginia.

sampleRecalls.title: Luxor Workspaces Recalls Audiovisual Carts Due to Serious Tip-Over Hazard; Three Deaths Reported
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves three cart base models: WT42 "Tuffy" plastic cart; W42/AVJ42/SS-AVJ42 metal cart; and LP-DUO/TPDUOEQ plastic cart. The WT42 "Tuffy" is a 3-shelf plastic cart sold under the brand name H. Wilson "Tuffy" in a variety of colors with different color suffixes after the "WT42" prefix in the item number.…
hazards: The recalled audiovisual (A/V) carts can become unstable when loaded with heavy objects, such as cathode-ray tube televisions (CRT TVs). When loaded with heavy…
injuries: Three children have died, and one child was seriously injured in incidents where recalled A/V carts carrying a "box" shaped television (CRT TV) tipped over and landed on them. The incidents occurred …
units: About 84,700 (In addition, approximately 1,650 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: Hearing Lab Technology/Lucid Audio Recalls Children's HearMuffs Due to Burn and Injury Hazards from Rupturing Alkaline Batteries
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves four models of powered HearMuffs, sound protection active sound compression ear muffs designed for children, which use AAA alkaline batteries. Models included in the recall are LA-infant-AM-WH, LA-infant-ASM-WH, LA-infant-ASM-WHPlus, and LA-kids-AM-WH which is printed on the original packaging. Th…
hazards: The AAA alkaline batteries included in the recalled HearMuffs can rupture, posing hearing, projectile and/or burn injury.
injuries: The firm has received 19 reports of rupturing batteries. No injuries have been reported.
products: Children's HearMuffs sound compression ear muffs

sampleRecalls.title: Audio-Technica Recalls Charging Cases Sold with Wireless Headphones Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the charging cases sold with Audio-Technica Wireless Headphones, Model ATH-CK3TW. The charging cases are made of plastic and were sold in black, blue, white and red colors. All colors of the charging cases will be replaced. The model number is printed on the rear of the charging case.
hazards: The portable charging cases can overheat, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: The firm has received four reports of incidents of the charging cases overheating, all outside of the United States. These incidents resulted in damage to the charging cases and to the surfaces on wh…
products: Charging Cases Sold with Audio-Technica Wireless Headphones, Model ATH-CK3TW

sampleRecalls.title: ION Audio Recalls Portable Speakers Due to Explosion Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Sport Express, Cornerstone, Cornerstone Glow, and Keystone ION Audio portable speakers. The Sport Express speaker is black in color and has two knobs on the front with a neon blue lit clock. It is about 9 inches wide and 9 inches tall. The Cornerstone and Cornerstone Glow speakers are triangul…
hazards: Hydrogen gas can leak from the portable speaker battery when charging and the speaker can burst, posing an explosion hazard.
injuries: Ion Audio has received five reports of speakers exploding including four incidents resulting in property damage to the surrounding area. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Olympus Recalls Digital Audio Recorders Due to Burn Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Olympus digital audio recorders with model number DS-5500. The recorders are black, measure about 4.5 inches tall by 1.9 inches wide by .67 inches thick. "Olympus" and "Digital Voice Recorder DS-5500" are printed on the front of the recorder. The recorder has three smart buttons, slide switches, e…
hazards: The recalled recorders can overheat when charging, posing a burn hazard to consumers and property.
injuries: Olympus has received three reports of the recorders overheating. No injuries or property damage have been reported.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was removing a blade from a drill press. The press's drill bit amputated her middle and ring fingers.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle backing up in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was guiding a pickup truck to a portable generator. The employee was pinned between the generator and the trailer hitch, which caused a puncture wound and soft tissue damage to the employee's upper right leg.

sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by slipping or swinging object held by injured worker
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was using a jack knife to cut a zip tie that was keeping two items of luggage together. As he was cutting the zip tie with his right hand, his hand moved towards the left hand, cutting his left wrist to the vein.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping over an object
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee got up from her desk to walk away. Her foot got caught in the computer wires underneath the desk. She fell and fractured her left hip and femur.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by falling object or equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Employees were loading materials when a box of gears fell onto one of them, causing compound fractures of the tibia and fibula.
